summary: Why The Dark Knight redefined the superhero genre forever

scenes.narration: In 2008, Christopher Nolan unleashed a film that would change superhero cinema forever. The Dark Knight wasn't just a Batman movie — it was a crime thriller masterpiece.
scenes.search_query: The Dark Knight official trailer HD

scenes.narration: Heath Ledger's Joker is often called the greatest villain performance in film history. His chaotic energy, the lip-licking, the scars — every detail was pure genius.
scenes.search_query: The Dark Knight Joker interrogation scene HD

scenes.narration: The pencil trick. The hospital explosion. The ferry dilemma. Nolan packed every frame with tension that kept audiences on the edge of their seats.
scenes.search_query: The Dark Knight hospital explosion scene

scenes.narration: The Dark Knight proved that superhero films could be art. It changed the genre forever, and Heath Ledger's legacy lives on in every frame.
scenes.search_query: The Dark Knight ending scene Batman runs
